reason: VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER=1 makes vLLM 'Using FlashInfer for top-p & top-k sampling', which JIT-compiles the FlashInfer sampling kernel via ninja; the ninja build returns non-zero exit status 1 in this container -> EngineCore initialization fails and the server never reaches readiness (RuntimeError: server exited before readiness with code 1). The #664 baseline pins VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER=0 (PyTorch-native sampler) for exactly this reason.
greedy_relevance: none -- the FlashInfer sampler path affects top-p / top-k sampling only; under greedy temp=0 argmax decoding it cannot change token outputs. This knob is both non-bootable in-container AND greedy-moot, so it is not a viable shippable latency lever.
